name: trace_window_edge_drag
description: v2.7.2 W2 stub (profile lands in W2): hover the timescale header -> window ports appear (dump windowPortLRect/windowPortRRect); mouse-down the RIGHT port at the dump rect and drag left -> mid-gesture dump asserts windowDragActive=true, windowPillText carries two ISO dates + span delta, candidate edge snapped to the visible scale unit, over-drag stops at the min-span/max-span/edge-cross clamps; header-band pixel-diff vs pre proves the axis preview painted while shape geometry/tags stayed untouched (two-phase render, SR-WIN-11); first drag on the auto-fit chart materializes the padded window with ZERO geometry delta (SR-WIN-04/D2); Esc mid-drag cancels -> window fields unchanged, preview cleared with a repaint (SR-WIN-12). Commit is a no-op seam in W2.
